# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest published version on npm (`mcp-agent-memory`) receives security
fixes. Older versions are not supported.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Instead, report privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/tverney/mcp-agent-memory/security/advisories/new).

Include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected version(s)
- Any suggested mitigation, if known

You should receive an acknowledgment within 7 days. I'll work with you to
confirm the issue, prepare a fix, and coordinate disclosure.
